message:
✨ What's New modal: release notes, update history, snooze, manual commands (closes #8265) (#8269)

* ✨ feat(ui): What's New modal with release notes, update history, snooze + manual-update commands

Replaces the 64-px navbar update dropdown with a full-page modal that
shows the latest GitHub release notes before the user commits to
updating. Addresses #8265.

New components:
- WhatsNewModal.tsx — BaseModal-based release-notes viewer with:
  - Latest release markdown rendered via react-markdown + shared
    releaseNotesComponents (extracted from MemoizedMessage.tsx).
  - "Previous releases" collapsible: shows up to 10 versions between
    the user's current version and the latest, each expandable to its
    full release body inline.
  - "Remind me later" snooze: 1 hour / tomorrow / next week. Stores
    snoozedUntil timestamp in localStorage; UpdateIndicator hides the
    green dot and suppresses the toast until expiry.
  - "How to update manually" collapsible: copy-paste commands per
    installMethod (dev → git pull + startup-oauth, helm → helm
    upgrade, binary → brew upgrade + curl start.sh).
  - "Update now" primary action that branches on installMethod:
    triggerUpdate() for local (kc-agent), POST /api/self-upgrade/trigger
    for helm (in-cluster Deployment patch).
  - "Skip this version" secondary action via skipVersion().
  - Kill-switch: localStorage 'kc-whats-new-modal-disabled' = '1'
    falls back to the old indicator-only behavior.

- releaseNotesComponents.tsx — shared markdown component map
  extracted from MemoizedMessage.tsx so both the chat sidebar and the
  modal render markdown with the same typography. MemoizedMessage
  will import from this shared file in a follow-up to remove the
  ~75 lines of duplication (kept separate in this PR to minimize
  blast radius).

Modified:
- UpdateIndicator.tsx — dropdown removed, replaced with useState +
  WhatsNewModal child. First-time detection toast fires once per tab
  session when hasUpdate flips true (sessionStorage-scoped). Snooze
  check + kill-switch check added to the render guard.

Backend: zero changes. All data comes from useVersionCheck() which
already polls GitHub releases + kc-agent /auto-update/status.

Closes #8265.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✅ test + refactor: WhatsNewModal tests, MemoizedMessage shared markdown, GA4 events

Follow-up to the WhatsNewModal prototype commit — addresses the three
items needed before merge:

1. **MemoizedMessage refactored** — now imports the shared markdown
   component map from `lib/markdown/releaseNotesComponents.tsx` via
   `buildReleaseNotesComponents(fontSize)` and spreads it, overriding
   only the `a` component (which needs react-router `Link` + Settings
   icon for internal routes). ~70 lines of duplicated h1-h6/p/ul/ol/
   code/blockquote/table/thead/th/td component definitions removed
   from MemoizedMessage.tsx.

2. **GA4 events added** — three new emit functions in analytics.ts:
   - `ksc_whats_new_modal_opened` — fired when the navbar button
     opens the modal (includes release_tag).
   - `ksc_whats_new_update_clicked` — fired on "Update now" (includes
     release_tag + install_method).
   - `ksc_whats_new_remind_later` — fired on snooze selection
     (includes release_tag + snooze_duration: 1h/1d/1w).
   Wired into UpdateIndicator.tsx (modal open) and WhatsNewModal.tsx
   (update + snooze actions).

3. **Unit tests** — WhatsNewModal.test.tsx with 15 passing tests:
   - Renders release notes when open, hidden when closed.
   - Shows previous releases section + manual update commands.
   - Has Update/Skip/Remind buttons.
   - Skip calls onClose.
   - Snooze dropdown shows 3 options, selection sets localStorage
     and closes modal.
   - isUpdateSnoozed: false by default, true during active snooze,
     false after expiry.
   - isKillSwitchEnabled: false by default, true when localStorage
     flag set.

Validation:
- npx tsc --noEmit: clean.
- npm run build: all post-build safety checks pass.
- npx vitest run WhatsNewModal.test.tsx: 15/15 pass.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

=> { + vi.clearAllMocks() + localStorage.clear() + sessionStorage.clear() + }) + + it('renders release notes when open', () => { + render() + expect(screen.getByTestId('modal')).toBeInTheDocument() + expect(screen.getByTestId('modal-header')).toHaveTextContent("What's new") + expect(screen.getByTestId('modal-header')).toHaveTextContent('v0.3.22') + expect(screen.getByTestId('markdown')).toHaveTextContent('Test Release') + }) + + it('does not render when closed', () => { + render() + expect(screen.queryByTestId('modal')).not.toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('shows previous releases section', () => { + render() + expect(screen.getByText(/Previous releases/)).toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('shows manual update commands section', () => { + render() + expect(screen.getByText(/How to update manually/)).toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('has Update now button', () => { + render() + expect(screen.getByText('Update now')).toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('has Skip this version button', () => { + render() + expect(screen.getByText('Skip this version')).toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('has Remind me later button', () => { + render() + expect(screen.getByText('Remind me later')).toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('calls onClose on skip', () => { + render() + fireEvent.click(screen.getByText('Skip this version')) + expect(onClose).toHaveBeenCalled() + }) + + it('shows snooze options when Remind me later is clicked', () => { + render() + fireEvent.click(screen.getByText('Remind me later')) + expect(screen.getByText('In 1 hour')).toBeInTheDocument() + expect(screen.getByText('Tomorrow')).toBeInTheDocument() + expect(screen.getByText('Next week')).toBeInTheDocument() + }) + + it('closes expect(onClose).toHaveBeenCalled() + expect(isUpdateSnoozed()).toBe(true) + }) +}) + +describe('isUpdateSnoozed', () => { + beforeEach(() => localStorage.clear()) + + it('returns false when no snooze is set', () => { + expect(isUpdateSnoozed()).toBe(false) + }) + + it('returns true during active snooze', () => { + localStorage.setItem('kc-update-snoozed', String(Date.now() + 60_000)) + expect(isUpdateSnoozed()).toBe(true) + }) + + it('returns false after snooze expires', () => { + localStorage.setItem('kc-update-snoozed', String(Date.now() - 1000)) + expect(isUpdateSnoozed()).toBe(false) + }) +}) + +describe('isKillSwitchEnabled', () => { + beforeEach(() => localStorage.clear()) + + it('returns false by default', () => { + expect(isKillSwitchEnabled()).toBe(false) + }) + + it('returns true when set', () => { + localStorage.setItem('kc-whats-new-modal-disabled', '1') + expect(isKillSwitchEnabled()).toBe(true) + }) +})

@@ -0,0 +1,336 @@ +import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react' +import { Download, Clock, SkipForward, ChevronDown, Copy, Check } from 'lucide-react' +import ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown' +import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm' +import remarkBreaks from 'remark-breaks' +import { BaseModal } from '../../lib/modals' +import { useVersionCheck } from '../../hooks/useVersionCheck' +import { useToast } from '../ui/Toast' +import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' +import { buildReleaseNotesComponents } from '../../lib/markdown/releaseNotesComponents' +import { cn } from '../../lib/cn' +import { copyToClipboard } from '../../lib/clipboard' +import { FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../lib/constants' +import { emitWhatsNewUpdateClicked, emitWhatsNewRemindLater } from '../../lib/analytics' + +const SNOOZE_STORAGE_KEY = 'kc-update-snoozed' +const KILL_SWITCH_KEY = 'kc-whats-new-modal-disabled' + +const SNOOZE_DURATION_1H_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000 +const SNOOZE_DURATION_1D_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 +const SNOOZE_DURATION_1W_MS = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 + +export function isUpdateSnoozed(): boolean { + try { + const raw = localStorage.getItem(SNOOZE_STORAGE_KEY) + if (!raw) return false + const snoozedUntil = Number(raw) + return Date.now() < snoozedUntil + } catch { + return false + } +} + +export function isKillSwitchEnabled(): boolean { + try { + return localStorage.getItem(KILL_SWITCH_KEY) === '1' + } catch { + return false + } +} + +function snoozeUpdate(durationMs: number) { + try { + localStorage.setItem(SNOOZE_STORAGE_KEY, String(Date.now() + durationMs)) + } catch { + // localStorage unavailable — silently ignore + } +} + +function formatRelativeTime(date: Date): string { + const diffMs = Date.now() - date.getTime() + const diffMin = Math.floor(diffMs / 60_000) + if (diffMin < 1) return 'just now' + if (diffMin < 60) return `${diffMin}m ago` + const diffH = Math.floor(diffMin / 60) + if (diffH < 24) return `${diffH}h ago` + const diffD = Math.floor(diffH / 24) + if (diffD === 1) return 'yesterday' + if (diffD < 30) return `${diffD}d ago` + return date.toLocaleDateString() +} + +interface WhatsNewModalProps { + isOpen: boolean + onClose: () => void +} + +export function WhatsNewModal({ isOpen, onClose }: WhatsNewModalProps) { + const { t } = useTranslation() + const { showToast } = useToast() + const { + latestRelease, + releases, + currentVersion, + installMethod, + skipVersion, + triggerUpdate, + } = useVersionCheck() + + const [updating, setUpdating] = useState(false) + const [showPreviousReleases, setShowPreviousReleases] = useState(false) + const [expandedRelease, setExpandedRelease] = useState(null) + const [showManualUpdate, setShowManualUpdate] = useState(false) + const [showSnoozeMenu, setShowSnoozeMenu] = useState(false) + const [copiedCommand, setCopiedCommand] = useState(null) + + const markdownComponents = useMemo(() => buildReleaseNotesComponents('sm'), []) + + const previousReleases = useMemo(() => { + if (!releases || !currentVersion || !latestRelease) return [] + return (releases || []) + .filter(r => r.tag !== latestRelease.tag && r.publishedAt > new Date(0)) + .sort((a, b) => b.publishedAt.getTime() - a.publishedAt.getTime()) + .slice(0, 10) + }, [releases, currentVersion, latestRelease]) + + const handleUpdate = useCallback(async () => { + setUpdating(true) + try { + if (installMethod === 'helm') { + const res = await fetch('/api/self-upgrade/trigger', { + method: 'POST', + signal: AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS), + }) + if (!res.ok) { + showToast(`Update failed: ${res.status}`, 'error') + return + } + } else { + const result = await triggerUpdate() + if (!result.success) { + showToast(result.error ?? 'Update failed', 'error') + return + } + } + emitWhatsNewUpdateClicked(latestRelease?.tag ?? '', installMethod ?? 'unknown') + showToast('Update running in background', 'info') + onClose() + } catch (err) { + showToast(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Update failed', 'error') + } finally { + setUpdating(false) + } + }, [installMethod, triggerUpdate, showToast, onClose]) + + const handleSkip = useCallback(() => { + if (latestRelease) { + skipVersion(latestRelease.tag) + } + onClose() + }, [latestRelease, skipVersion, onClose]) + + const handleSnooze = useCallback((durationMs: number, label: string) => { + snoozeUpdate(durationMs) + setShowSnoozeMenu(false) + emitWhatsNewRemindLater(latestRelease?.tag ?? '', label) + showToast('Update reminder snoozed', 'info') + onClose() + }, [showToast, onClose, latestRelease?.tag]) + + const handleCopyCommand = useCallback(async (cmd: string) => { + await copyToClipboard(cmd) + setCopiedCommand(cmd) + setTimeout(() => setCopiedCommand(null), 2000) + }, []) + + const manualCommands: { label: string; command: string }[] = useMemo(() => { + switch (installMethod) { + case 'dev': + return [{ label: 'From source', command: 'cd /tmp/kubestellar-console && git pull && bash startup-oauth.sh' }] + case 'helm': + return [{ label: 'Helm', command: 'helm upgrade kubestellar-console kubestellar/console -n kubestellar-console' }] + case 'binary': + return [ + { label: 'Homebrew', command: 'brew upgrade kc-agent' }, + { label: 'Quick install', command: 'curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console/main/start.sh | bash' }, + ] + default: + return [{ label: 'Quick install', command: 'curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubestellar/console/main/start.sh | bash' }] + } + }, [installMethod]) + + if (!latestRelease) return null + + const relativeTime = formatRelativeTime(latestRelease.publishedAt) + + return ( + + + + +
+ {/* Primary release notes */} +
+ + {latestRelease.releaseNotes || '*No release notes available.*'} + +
+ + {/* Previous releases (collapsible) */} + {previousReleases.length > 0 && ( +
+ + {showPreviousReleases && ( +
+ {previousReleases.map(release => ( +
+ + {expandedRelease === release.tag && release.releaseNotes && ( +
+ + {release.releaseNotes} + +
+ )} +
+ ))} +
+ )} +
+ )} + + {/* Manual update commands (collapsible) */} +
+ + {showManualUpdate && ( +
+ {manualCommands.map(({ label, command }) => ( +
+ {label}: + {command} + +
+ ))} +
+ )} +
+
+ + + +
+
+ + + {/* Remind me later dropdown */} +
+ + {showSnoozeMenu && ( +
+ + + +
+ )} +
+
+ +
+ + +
+
+ + + ) +}
